title: Bottomonium Survival Probabilities from qtraj-nlo for PbPb at 5 TeV
abstract: Survival probabilities of bottomonium states (1S, 2S, 3S, 1P, 2P) computed using the qtraj-nlo quantum trajectory method for PbPb collisions at sqrt(s_NN) = 5 TeV. Results are provided for the Munich potential with and without quantum jumps, and for KSU potentials (isotropic and anisotropic). Kappa-hat values from 2 to 6 are scanned, with results for all impact parameters.
code_reference: Strickland et al., Comput. Phys. Commun. (2023)
